MCM.Settings.Enable.Name: Enable Custom Cursor
MCM.Settings.Enable.Hint: Enable or disable the custom cursor and trail effects.
MCM.Settings.HideSystemCursor.Name: Hide System Cursor
MCM.Settings.HideSystemCursor.Hint: Force-hide the system's default mouse pointer. (Requires world reload)
MCM.Settings.TrailLength.Name: Trail Length
MCM.Settings.TrailLength.Hint: Number of tracked history points. Higher values create longer trails.
MCM.Settings.CursorShape.Name: Cursor Shape
MCM.Settings.CursorShape.Hint: Select the cursor display shape. Custom images take priority if uploaded.
MCM.Settings.CursorImage.Name: Custom Cursor Image
MCM.Settings.CursorImage.Hint: Upload an image to use as the cursor (PNG recommended). Leave empty to use the shape above.
MCM.Settings.CursorSize.Name: Cursor Size
MCM.Settings.CursorSize.Hint: Radius or scale of the cursor graphic.
MCM.Settings.RainbowMode.Name: Rainbow Mode
MCM.Settings.RainbowMode.Hint: When enabled, cursor and trail colors cycle continuously.
MCM.Settings.BaseColor.Name: Cursor Color
MCM.Settings.BaseColor.Hint: Main color of the cursor. (Used when Rainbow Mode is off)
MCM.Settings.TrailColor.Name: Trail Color
MCM.Settings.TrailColor.Hint: Set a separate trail color. Leave empty to follow the cursor color.
MCM.Settings.TrailImage.Name: Custom Trail Image
MCM.Settings.TrailImage.Hint: Image used when trail style is set to "Image Repeat".
MCM.Settings.TrailStyle.Name: Trail Style
MCM.Settings.TrailStyle.Hint: Select the visual style of the trail effect.
MCM.Settings.ParticlePreset.Name: Particle Preset
MCM.Settings.ParticlePreset.Hint: When trail style is set to "Particles", choose a particle behavior preset.
